elites.name: Bygone Effigy
elites.notes: Starts with Slow. Sleep: Pass Turn. Wake: Gain 10 Strength. Slash: 13 (15) dmg. Slow: Attacks deal 10% extra damage per card played this turn. Starts Sleep → Wake → Slash, then Slash every turn.

elites.name: Byrdonis
elites.notes: Starts with Territorial 1. Peck: 3x3 (4x3) dmg. Swoop: 17 (19) dmg. Territorial X: gains X strength at end of turn. Alternates Swoop → Peck.

elites.name: Phrog Parasite
elites.notes: Starts with Infested 4. Infect: Add 3 Infection to Discard. Lash: 4x4 (5x4) dmg. Summons 4 Wrigglers after death (start stunned). Alternates Infect → Lash.

bosses.name: Ceremonial Beast
bosses.notes: Stamp: Gains Plow 150 (160). Plow: 18 (20) dmg + 2 Strength each turn. At ≤150 (160) HP, stunned and loses all Strength. Beast Cry: Apply Ringing (play only 1 card). Stomp: 15 (17) dmg. Crush: 17 (19) dmg + 3 (4) Strength. Starts Stamp, then Plow until stunned, then cycles Beast Cry → Stomp → Crush.

bosses.name: The Kin
bosses.notes: Kin Priest cycles Orb of Frailty 8 (9) + Frail → Orb of Weakness 8 (9) + Weak → Beam 3x3 → Ritual +2 (3) Str. Kin Follower (minion) cycles Quick Slash 5 → Boomerang 2x2 → Power Dance +2 (3) Str.

bosses.name: Vantom
bosses.notes: Starts with Slippery 9 (first 9 times loses HP, only lose 1). Ink Blot: 7 (8) dmg. Inky Lance: 6x2 (7x2) dmg. Dismember: 27 (30) dmg + 3 Wounds to discard. Prepare: Gain 2 Strength. Cycles Ink Blot → Inky Lance → Dismember → Prepare.

options.name: Let Go
options.effect: Transform a card in your Deck.

options.name: Maintain Control
options.effect: Upgrade a card in your Deck.

events.name: Byrdonis Nest
events.condition: Can only occur if you do not have an event pet

options.name: Eat the Egg
options.effect: Gain 7 Max HP.

options.name: Take the Egg
options.effect: Add Byrdonis Egg to your Deck.
options.notes: While Byrdonis Egg is in your deck you can select Hatch as a Rest Site action, which removes Byrdonis Egg and adds a Byrd Swoop to your deck.

options.name: Trudge On
options.effect: Lose 8 HP. Gain 61-99 Gold.

options.name: Rest
options.effect: Heal 30% Max HP. Fight 4 Wrigglers.
options.notes: Receive regular combat rewards after the fight.

options.name: Solo Quest
options.effect: Gain 135 - 165 Gold. Lose 18 HP.

options.name: Join Forces
options.effect: Gain 35 - 65 Gold.

events.name: Luminous Choir
events.condition: Can only occur if you have 150 gold or more

options.name: Reach into the Flesh
options.effect: Remove 2 cards from your Deck. Add Spore Mind to your Deck.

options.name: Offer Tribute
options.effect: Pay 100 - 150 Gold. Obtain a random Relic.

events.name: Morphic Grove
events.condition: Can only occur if you have at least 2 transformable cards.

options.name: Group
options.effect: Lose ALL Gold. Transform 2 cards.

options.name: Loner
options.effect: Gain 5 Max HP.

options.name: Consume
options.effect: Heal 9 HP. Upgrade a card in your Deck.

options.name: Plant and Nourish
options.effect: Enchant a card with Sown.
options.notes: Sown: The first time you play this card each combat, gain 1 energy.

options.name: Grab the Sword
options.effect: Obtain the Sword of Stone.

options.name: Dive into the Water
options.effect: Gain 101 - 121 Gold. Lose 7 HP.

options.name: Decipher
options.effect: Lose 3 Max HP. Upgrade a random card.
options.notes: Followed by a choice between Continue Deciphering and Give Up.

options.name: Smash
options.effect: Heal 20 HP.

options.name: Continue Deciphering
options.effect: Lose 6 Max HP. Upgrade a random card.
options.notes: Followed by a choice between Keep Deciphering and Give Up.

options.name: Keep Deciphering
options.effect: Lose 12 Max HP. Upgrade a random card.
options.notes: Followed by a choice between KEEP DECIPHERING and Give Up.

options.name: KEEP DECIPHERING
options.effect: Lose 24 Max HP. Upgrade a random card.
options.notes: Followed by a choice between Lose Everything and Give Up.

options.name: Lose Everything
options.effect: Set your Max HP to 1. Upgrade ALL of your cards.

options.name: Give Up
options.effect: Leave.

events.name: Unrest Site
events.condition: Can only occur if you are missing 30% of your max HP or more

options.name: Rest Anyways
options.effect: Heal to full HP. Receive Poor Sleep.

options.name: Kill the Trees
options.effect: Lose 8 Max HP. Obtain a random Relic.

options.name: Bottle
options.effect: Procure 1 random Potion.
options.notes: Random potion is generated uniformly (all potions equally likely regardless of rarity).

options.name: Bathe
options.effect: Remove 1 card from your Deck. Add 1 Guilty to your Deck.

events.name: Whispering Hollow
events.condition: Can only occur if you have 50 gold or more

options.name: Exchange Gold
options.effect: Lose 50 Gold. Procure 2 random Potions.
options.notes: Random potions are generated following rarity chances.

options.name: Hug the Tree
options.effect: Lose 9 HP. Choose a card to Transform.

events.name: Wood Carvings
events.condition: Can only occur if you have a starter card in your deck

options.name: Bird
options.effect: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into Peck.

options.name: Snake
options.effect: Enchant 1 card with Slither.
options.notes: Slither: When you draw this card, randomize its cost from 0 to 3.

options.name: Torus
options.effect: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into Toric Toughness.

elites.name: Skulking Colony
elites.notes: Starts with Hardened Shell 15. Smash: 9 (11) dmg + 5 Dazed to discard. Zoom: 16 (17) dmg + 10 (13) block. Inertia: Gain 3 (4) Strength + 3 Dazed to discard. Piercing Stabs: 7x2 (8x2) dmg. Cannot lose more than 15 HP per turn. Cycles Smash → Zoom → Inertia → Piercing Stabs.

elites.name: Phantasmal Gardeners
elites.notes: Starts with Skittish 6 (7). Bite: 5 dmg. Lash: 7 dmg. Flail: 1x3 dmg. Enlarge: Gain 2 (3) Strength. 1st starts Flail, 2nd Bite, 3rd Lash, 4th Enlarge. Then cycle Bite → Lash → Flail → Enlarge. Skittish: first hit each turn gains X block.

elites.name: Terror Eel
elites.notes: Starts with Shriek 75. Crash: 16 (18) dmg. Thrash: 3x3 (4x3) dmg + 6 Vigor. Terror: Apply 99 Vulnerable. Cycles Crash → Thrash until stunned at 75 HP, then Terror, then resumes Crash → Thrash.

bosses.name: Lagavulin Matriarch
bosses.notes: Starts with 12 Plating, sleeps 3 turns or until losing HP. On wakeup, Plating removed. Slash: 19 (21) dmg. Disembowel: 9x2 (10x2) dmg. Slash 2: 12 (14) dmg + 12 (14) block. Soul Siphon: -2 Str, -2 Dex, +2 Str. Cycles Slash → Disembowel → Slash 2 → Soul Siphon.

bosses.name: Soul Fysh
bosses.notes: Beckon: 1-cost status, lose 6 HP if in hand at end of turn. Shuffles Beckons into draw+discard. De-Gas: 16 (17) dmg. Gaze: 7 (8) dmg + Beckon to discard. Fade: Gain 2 Intangible (1 ticks immediately). Scream: 11 (12) dmg + 3 Vulnerable. Cycles Beckon → De-Gas → Gaze → Fade → Scream.

bosses.name: Waterfall Giant
bosses.notes: Steam Eruption X: after dying, wait 1 turn, then attack for X damage. Pressurize: +15 (20) Steam Eruption. Stomp: 15 (16) dmg + 1 Weak + 3 Steam. Ram: 10 (11) dmg + 3 Steam. Siphon: Heal 15 + 3 Steam. Pressure Gun: 20 (23) + 5*N dmg + 3 Steam (N=uses). Pressure Up: 13 (14) dmg + 3 Steam. Cycles through all 6 moves.

options.name: Immerse
options.effect: Gain 2 Max HP. Take N damage.
options.notes: N = 3 + # times Immerse has been selected previously. Followed by a choice between Immerse and Exit Baths.

options.name: Abstain
options.effect: Heal 10 HP.

options.name: Exit Baths
options.effect: Leave.

options.name: Light Door
options.effect: Upgrade 2 random cards.

options.name: Dark Door
options.effect: Remove 1 card from your Deck.

options.name: Bottle
options.effect: Procure Glowwater Potion.

options.name: Climb
options.effect: Obtain Fresnel Lens. Lose 13 Max HP.

events.name: Endless Conveyor
events.condition: Can only occur if you have 120 gold or more

options.name: Grab [Dish] off the Belt
options.effect: Pay 40 Gold. Receive a boon based on the [Dish]. Continue Feasting!
options.notes: Dish is generated randomly from allowed options according to their weights. Cannot select the same dish twice in a row.

options.name: Caviar
options.effect: Gain 4 Max HP.
options.notes: Weight = 6.

options.name: Clam Roll
options.effect: Heal 10 HP.
options.notes: Weight = 6. Only allowed if you are missing HP.

options.name: Fried Eel
options.effect: Add a random Colorless Card to your Deck.
options.notes: Weight = 3.

options.name: Golden Fysh
options.effect: Gain 75 Gold.
options.notes: Weight = 1. Only allowed after the 1st dish.

options.name: Jelly Liver
options.effect: Transform 1 card in your Deck.
options.notes: Weight = 3.

options.name: Seapunk Salad
options.effect: Add Feeding Frenzy to your Deck.
options.notes: Guaranteed to be offered every 5th dish. Otherwise not allowed.

options.name: Spicy Snappy
options.effect: Upgrade a random card in your Deck.
options.notes: Weight = 3.

options.name: Suspicious Condiment
options.effect: Procure a random potion.
options.notes: Weight = 3. Only allowed if you have an empty potion slot.

options.name: Observe the Chef
options.effect: Upgrade a random card in your Deck.

options.name: Leave
options.effect: Leave.

events.name: Punch Off
events.condition: Can only occur on floor 6 or higher

options.name: Nab
options.effect: Add Injury to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.

options.name: I Can Take Them
options.effect: Fight 2 Punch Constructs.
options.notes: Receive regular combat rewards after the fight, plus an extra potion and a relic.

events.name: Spiraling Whirlpool
events.condition: Can only occur if you have an enchantable basic Strike or Defend in your deck

options.name: Observe
options.effect: Enchant a Strike or Defend with Spiral.
options.notes: Spiral: This card gains Replay 1.

options.name: Drink
options.effect: Heal 33% Max HP.

options.name: Grab the Sword
options.effect: Obtain the Sword of Stone.

options.name: Dive into the Water
options.effect: Gain 101 - 121 Gold. Lose 7 HP.

options.name: First Chest
options.effect: Gain 52 - 67 Gold.

options.name: Second Chest
options.effect: Gain 303 - 363 Gold. Receive Greed.

events.name: Trash Heap
events.condition: Can only occur if you have 6 HP or more

options.name: Dive In
options.effect: Lose 8 HP. Obtain a random forgotten Relic from the past.
options.notes: Forgotten relics: Darkstone Periapt, Dream Catcher, Hand Drill, Maw Bank, The Boot

options.name: Grab Random Junk
options.effect: Gain 100 Gold. Obtain a random forgotten card from the past.
options.notes: Forgotten cards: Caltrops, Clash, Distraction, Dual Wield, Entrench, Hello World, Outmaneuver, Rebound, Rip and Tear, Stack

events.name: Waterlogged Scriptorium
events.condition: Can only occur if you have 65 gold or more

options.name: Bloody Ink
options.effect: Gain 6 Max HP.

options.name: Tentacle Quill
options.effect: Pay 65 Gold. Enchant a card with Steady.
options.notes: Steady: This card gains Retain.

options.name: Prickly Sponge
options.effect: Pay 155 Gold. Enchant 2 cards with Steady.

elites.name: Decimillipede
elites.notes: 3 segments. Starts with Reattach. Writhe: 5x2 (6x2) dmg. Bulk: 6 (7) dmg + 2 Strength. Constrict: 8 (9) dmg + 1 Weak. Segments cycle Writhe → Bulk → Constrict (each starts at different point). Reattach: revives after 2 turns with 25 HP if other segments alive.

elites.name: Entomancer
elites.notes: Starts with Personal Hive 1. Bees: 3x7 (3x8) dmg. Spear: 18 (20) dmg. Pheromone Spit: gain 1 Personal Hive + 1 Strength (if <3 Hive) or 2 Strength (if at 3). Personal Hive X: add X Dazed to draw pile when hit. Cycles Bees → Spear → Pheromone Spit.

elites.name: Infested Prisms
elites.notes: Starts with Vital Spark 1. Jab: 22 (24) dmg. Radiate: 16 (18) dmg + 16 (18) block. Whirlwind: 9x3 (10x3) dmg. Pulsate: 20 (22) block + 4 (5) Strength. Vital Spark X: first attack each turn gives attacker X energy. Cycles Jab → Radiate → Whirlwind → Pulsate.

bosses.name: Kaiser Crab
bosses.notes: Two enemies. Both start with Back Attack (50% more dmg from behind) and Crab Rage (ally dies: +6 Str, +99 Block). Crusher cycles Thrash 12 (14) → Enlarging Strike 4 → Bug Sting 6x2 (7x2) +2 Weak +2 Frail → Adapt +2 Str → Guarded Strike 12 (14) +18 Block. Rocket cycles Targeting Reticle 3 (4) → Precision Beam 18 (20) → Charge Up +2 (3) Str → Laser 31 (35) → Recharge (pass).

bosses.name: Knowledge Demon
bosses.notes: Curse of Knowledge: choose between two debuffs (Disintegration 6/7/8 or Mind Rot/Sloth/Waste Away). Slap: 17 (18) dmg. Knowledge Overwhelming: 8x3 (9x3) dmg. Ponder: 11 (13) dmg + Heal 30 + 2 (3) Str. Cycles CoK → Slap → KO → Ponder. After 3 CoK uses, drops CoK from cycle.

bosses.name: The Insatiable
bosses.notes: Sandpit X: in X turns, instantly die. Liquify Ground: Gain Sandpit 4 + shuffle 6 Frantic Escapes (3 draw, 3 discard). Frantic Escape: 1-cost status, increases card cost and Sandpit by 1. Thrash: 8x2 (9x2) dmg. Lunging Bite: 28 (31) dmg. Salivate: +2 (3) Str. Starts Liquify Ground, then cycles Thrash → Lunging Bite → Salivate → Thrash.

events.name: Amalgamator
events.condition: Can only occur if you have at least 2 basic Strikes and 2 basic Defends

options.name: Combine Strikes
options.effect: Remove 2 Strikes. Add Ultimate Strike to your Deck.

options.name: Combine Defends
options.effect: Remove 2 Defends. Add Ultimate Defend to your Deck.

options.name: Learn Extermination Technique
options.effect: Add Exterminate to your Deck.

options.name: Learn Squash Technique
options.effect: Add Squash to your Deck.

options.name: [Character Color] x 3
options.effect: Receive 1 Common card pack, 1 Uncommon card pack, and 1 Rare card pack from the selected character's card pool.
options.notes: 3 random (unlocked) characters are selected for the card pool options.

events.name: Colossal Flower
events.condition: Can only occur if you have 19 HP or more

options.name: Extract Nectar
options.effect: Gain 35 Gold.

options.name: Extract Nectar (2)
options.effect: Gain 75 Gold.

options.name: Extract Nectar (3)
options.effect: Gain 135 Gold.

options.name: Reach Deeper
options.effect: Enter deeper. Lose 5 HP.
options.notes: Followed by a choice between Extract Nectar (2) and Reach Deeper (2).

options.name: Reach Deeper (2)
options.effect: Enter deeper. Lose 6 HP.
options.notes: Followed by a choice between Extract Nectar (3) and Reach Deeper (3).

options.name: Reach Deeper (3)
options.effect: Obtain Pollinous Core. Lose 7 HP.

events.name: Field of Man-Sized Holes
events.condition: Can only occur if you have an enchantable card (cards can only have 1 enchantment)

options.name: Resist
options.effect: Remove 2 cards from your Deck. Add Normality to your Deck.

options.name: Enter Your Hole
options.effect: Enchant a card with Perfect Fit.
options.notes: Perfect Fit: Whenever this would be shuffled into your Draw Pile, place it on the top instead.

options.name: Study
options.effect: Obtain a random Power.
options.notes: Generated using regular rare and uncommon chance with no offset (so will almost always be uncommon).

options.name: Touch the Core
options.effect: Obtain a random 0 cost card.
options.notes: Generated using regular rare and uncommon chance with no offset (so will almost always be common or uncommon).

options.name: Capture the Wisp
options.effect: Add Decay to your Deck. Obtain the Lost Wisp.

options.name: Search the Nearby Area
options.effect: Gain 45 - 75 Gold.

options.name: Let It In
options.effect: Heal 25 HP. Add Metamorphosis to your Deck.

options.name: Rejection
options.effect: Lose 10 HP. Upgrade a card.

options.name: Return the Key
options.effect: Gain 100 Gold.

options.name: Keep the Key
options.effect: Fight the Mysterious Knight to obtain the Lantern Key.
options.notes: Mysterious Knight is the same as a Flail Knight but starts with 6 Strength and 6 Plating. If you have the Lantern Key, the first ? room in Act 3 will be the War Historian, Repy event.

events.name: Zen Weaver
events.condition: Can only occur if you have 125 gold or more

options.name: Breathing Techniques
options.effect: Pay 50 Gold. Add 2 Enlightenment to your Deck.

options.name: Emotional Awareness
options.effect: Pay 125 Gold. Remove 1 card from your Deck.

options.name: Arachnid Acupuncture
options.effect: Pay 250 Gold. Remove 2 cards from your Deck.

elites.name: Knights
elites.notes: 3 knights. Flail Knight: Ram 15 (17), Flail 9x2 (10x2), War Chant +3 Str. Starts Ram, then random (no move 3x in row). Spectral Knight: Hex (all cards ethereal), Soul Slash 15 (17), Soul Flame 3x3 (4x3). Starts Hex → Soul Slash, then random. Magi Knight: Dampen (downgrades cards), Power Shield 6 (7) + 5 (9) block, Spear 10 (11), Prep 5 (9) block, Magic Bomb 35 (40). Cycles Power Shield → Dampen → Spear → Prep → Magic Bomb.

elites.name: Mecha Knight
elites.notes: Starts with Artifact 3. Charge: 25 (30) dmg. Flamethrower: Add 4 Burns to hand. Windup: 15 block + 5 Strength. Heavy Cleave: 35 (40) dmg. Starts Charge, then cycles Flamethrower → Windup → Heavy Cleave.

elites.name: Soul Nexus
elites.notes: Soul Burn: 29 (31) dmg. Maelstrom: 6x4 (7x4) dmg. Drain Life: 18 (19) dmg + 2 Vulnerable + 2 Weak. Starts Soul Burn, then random (no repeats). All options equally likely.

bosses.name: Doormaker
bosses.notes: Starts with infinite HP. Dramatic Open: loses infinite max HP, clears all powers, gains Hunger of the Void. Hunger of the Void: every 10th card drawn is removed, Doormaker gains 1 (2) Str. Beam: 10x3 (11x3) dmg. Chomp: 40 (45) dmg. Pulverize: 20 (22) dmg + 2 (3) Str. Starts Dramatic Open, then cycles Beam → Chomp → Pulverize.

bosses.name: Queen
bosses.notes: Starts with Torch Head Amalgam. Puppet Strings: Chains of Binding 3. You Are Mine!: 99 Frail + 99 Weak + 99 Vulnerable. While Amalgam alive: Burn Bright For Me (allies +1 Str, 20 block). If Amalgam dies: cycles Off With Your Head 3x5 (4x5) → Execution 15 (18) → Enrage +2 Str. Amalgam cycles Tackle 18 (19) x2 → Soul Beam 8x3 → Weak Tackle 14 (15) x2.

bosses.name: Test Subject #C14

stages.notes: Starts with Enrage 3. Cycles Bite -> Skull Bash. When killed, revives in stage 2.
Starts with Painful Stabs 1. Uses Multi-Claw every turn. N = 3 + # times Multi-Claw used.
Starts with Nemesis (immediately gains 1 Intangible). Cycles Lacerate -> Big Pounce -> Burning Growl.

bosses.notes: 3 stages. Stage 1: Enrage 3 (+3 Str per skill played). Bite 20 (22), Skull Bash 14 (16) +1 Vuln. Cycles Bite → Skull Bash. Revives to Stage 2. Stage 2: Painful Stabs 1 (shuffle Wounds on unblocked dmg). Multi-Claw 10xN (11xN), N=3+uses. Stage 3: Nemesis (Intangible every other turn). Lacerate 10x3 (11x3), Big Pounce 45, Burning Growl 3 (5) Burns +2 (3) Str. Cycles Lacerate → Big Pounce → Burning Growl.

options.name: Setting 1
options.effect: Fight a 75 HP dummy. Procure 1 random Potion.
options.notes: Must defeat the dummy within 3 turns to earn the reward.

options.name: Setting 2
options.effect: Fight a 150 HP dummy. Upgrade 2 random cards.
options.notes: Must defeat the dummy within 3 turns to earn the reward.

options.name: Setting 3
options.effect: Fight a 300 HP dummy. Obtain a random Relic.
options.notes: Must defeat the dummy within 3 turns to earn the reward.

events.name: Grave of the Forgotten
events.condition: Can only occur if you have a card with Exhaust.

options.name: Accept the Forgotten Soul
options.effect: Obtain Forgotten Soul.
options.notes: Forgotten Soul (relic): Whenever you Exhaust a card, deal 1 damage to a random enemy.

options.name: Confront with Truth
options.effect: Add Decay to your Deck. Enchant a card that Exhausts with Soul's Power.
options.notes: Soul's Power: This card loses Exhaust.

options.name: Big Mushroom
options.effect: Obtain Big Mushroom.
options.notes: Big Mushroom (relic): Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 20. At the start of each combat, draw 2 fewer cards.

options.name: Fragrant Mushroom
options.effect: Obtain Fragrant Mushroom.
options.notes: Fragrant Mushroom (relic): Upon pickup, lose 15 HP and Upgrade 3 random cards.

options.name: Touch a Mirror
options.effect: Downgrade 2 random cards. Upgrade 4 random cards.
options.notes: Can upgrade a card that was just downgraded.

options.name: Shatter
options.effect: Duplicate your Deck. Receive Bad Luck.

events.name: The Round Tea Party
events.condition: Can only occur if you have at least 12 HP.

options.name: Enjoy Your Tea
options.effect: Obtain Royal Poison. Heal to full HP.

options.name: Pick a Fight
options.effect: Lose 11 HP. Obtain a random Relic.

options.name: Accept
options.effect: Create a custom card to add to your Deck.
options.notes: Followed by choosing the card type from two of the three options Protector, Weapon, and Power.

options.name: Protector
options.effect: Make a Skill. Base effect: 1 energy, gain 8 block.
options.notes: Followed by choosing the secondary effect from two of the three options Chaos, Energized, and Wisdom.

options.name: Chaos
options.effect: Add a random card into your Hand. It costs 0 energy this turn.
options.notes: Upgrade adds Innate.

options.name: Energized
options.effect: Gain 2 energy.

options.name: Wisdom
options.effect: Draw 3 cards.

options.name: Weapon
options.effect: Make an Attack. Base effect: 1 energy, deal 12 damage.
options.notes: Followed by choosing the secondary effect from two of the three options Choking, Sapping, and Violence.

options.name: Choking
options.effect: Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses 6 HP.
options.notes: Upgrade adds Innate.

options.name: Sapping
options.effect: Apply 2 Weak. Apply 2 Vulnerable.

options.name: Violence
options.effect: Hits 2 additional times.

options.name: Gadget
options.effect: Make a Power. Base effect: 1 energy.
options.notes: Followed by choosing the secondary effect from two of the three options Curious, Expertise, and Improvement.

options.name: Curious
options.effect: Powers cost 1 less energy.
options.notes: Upgrade adds Innate.

options.name: Expertise
options.effect: Gain 2 Strength. Gain 2 Dexterity.

options.name: Improvement
options.effect: At the end of combat, upgrade a random card.

options.name: Accept
options.effect: Serve as today's Decider.
options.notes: Followed by a choice between DECIDE: Guilty and DECIDE: Innocent, with three variations depending on the defendant.

options.name: Merchant - DECIDE: Guilty
options.effect: Add Regret to your Deck. Gain 2 random relics.

options.name: Merchant - DECIDE: Innocent
options.effect: Add Shame to your Deck. Upgrade 2 cards in your Deck.

options.name: Noble - DECIDE: Guilty
options.effect: Heal 10 HP.

options.name: Noble - DECIDE: Innocent
options.effect: Add Regret to your Deck. Gain 300 Gold.

options.name: Nondescript Woman - DECIDE: Guilty
options.effect: Add Doubt to your Deck. Gain 2 card rewards.

options.name: Nondescript Woman - DECIDE: Innocent
options.effect: Add Doubt to your Deck. Transform 2 cards.

options.name: Reject
options.effect: You are not allowed to Reject.
options.notes: Followed by a choice between Accept and Double Down.

options.name: Double Down
options.effect: Abandon the run.

sharedEvents.name: Brain Leech
sharedEvents.condition: Can only occur in Acts 1 and 2

options.name: Share Knowledge
options.effect: Choose 1 of 5 random cards to add to your Deck.
options.notes: Cards are generated using regular rare/uncommon chance without offset.

options.name: Rip the Leech Off
options.effect: Lose 5 HP. Gain a Colorless card reward.
options.notes: Uses regular rare/uncommon chance without offset.

sharedEvents.name: Crystal Sphere
sharedEvents.condition: Can only occur in Act 2 and 3 if you have at least 100 gold

options.name: Uncover Future
options.effect: Pay 50 Gold. Divine 3 times.
options.notes: Both options enter the Crystal Sphere minigame. Divining uncovers squares in the grid. Any fully uncovered items are gained as rewards.

options.name: Payment Plan
options.effect: Gain a Debt. Divine 6 times.

options.name: Pick at Random
options.effect: Obtain a random Doll Relic.
options.notes: Doll relics: Bing Bong (whenever you add a card to your Deck, add one additional copy), Daughter of the Wind (whenever you play an Attack, gain 1 Block), Mr. Struggles (at the start of your turn, deal damage equal to the turn number to ALL enemies).

options.name: Take Some Time
options.effect: Lose 5 HP. Choose 1 of 2 Doll Relics.

options.name: Examine Each and Make the Best Choice
options.effect: Lose 15 HP. Choose 1 of 3 Doll Relics.

sharedEvents.name: The Merchant???
sharedEvents.condition: Can only occur in Acts 2 or 3 if you have at least 100 gold or a Foul Potion

options.name: Buy knockoff relics
options.effect: 6 random knockoff (???) relics offered for 42-57 gold each.
options.notes: You can throw a Foul Potion to fight the Fake Merchant. If you win you get 300 gold, all knockoff relics, Merchant's Rug???, a regular combat potion roll, and a regular card reward.

options.name: Anchor???
options.effect: Start each combat with 4 Block.

options.name: Blood Vial???
options.effect: At the start of each combat, heal 1 HP.

options.name: Happy Flower???
options.effect: Every 5 turns, gain 1 energy.

options.name: Lee's Waffle???
options.effect: Upon pickup, heal 10% of your HP.

options.name: Mango???
options.effect: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 3.

options.name: The Merchant's Rug???
options.effect: Poor imitation. Does nothing.

options.name: Orichalcum???
options.effect: If you end your turn without Block, gain 3 Block.

options.name: Snecko Eye???
options.effect: Start each combat Confused.

options.name: Strike Dummy???
options.effect: Cards containing "Strike" deal 1 additional damage.

options.name: Venerable Tea Set???
options.effect: Whenever you enter a Rest Site, start the next combat with an additional energy.

sharedEvents.name: Potion Courier
sharedEvents.condition: Can only occur in Acts 2 or 3

options.name: Grab Potions
options.effect: Procure 3 Foul Potions.
options.notes: Foul potions can be thrown at the Merchant to gain 100 gold, or at the Fake Merchant to trigger the Fake Merchant fight.

options.name: Ransack
options.effect: Procure 1 random Uncommon Potion.

options.name: Give 100 Gold
options.effect: Obtain a random Relic.

options.name: Give Potion
options.effect: Obtain a random Relic.

options.name: Give Relic
options.effect: Obtain 2 random Relics.

options.name: Take the Bottom One
options.effect: Trade one of your Relics for a random Relic.
options.notes: Each option names the random relic, so you know exactly what you are trading for.

options.name: Take the Middle One
options.effect: Trade one of your Relics for a random Relic.

options.name: Take the Top One
options.effect: Trade one of your Relics for a random Relic.

options.name: Gorge
options.effect: Choose 2 of 8 random Common cards to add to your Deck.

options.name: Search
options.effect: Lose 14 HP. Obtain the Chosen Cheese.

options.name: Read the Entire Book
options.effect: Choose a Power to Enchant with Swift 2.
options.notes: Swift: The first time you play this card, draw X cards.

options.name: Read a Random Passage
options.effect: Choose a Skill to Enchant with Nimble 2.
options.notes: Nimble: Increases Block gained from this card by X.

options.name: Read the Back
options.effect: Choose an Attack to Enchant with Sharp 2.
options.notes: Sharp: Increases damage from this card by X.

options.name: Overcome
options.effect: A random card is removed from your Deck.

options.name: Hold On
options.effect: Lose 3+ HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

options.name: Drink and Lift
options.effect: Lose a random Potion. Gain 10 Max HP.

options.name: Push
options.effect: Lose 6 HP. Enchant an Attack with Vigorous 8.
options.notes: Vigorous: The first time this card is played, it deals X additional damage.

options.name: Approach
options.effect: Enchant an Attack with Corrupted.
options.notes: Corrupted: Deal 50% more damage, but lose 2 HP.

options.name: Kill with Fire
options.effect: Choose a card to Transform.

options.name: Bone Tea
options.effect: Pay 50 Gold. In the next combat, upgrade your starting hand.

options.name: Ember Tea
options.effect: Pay 150 Gold. Gain 4 strength in the next 5 combats.

options.name: Tea of Discourtesy
options.effect: Add 2 Dazed to the draw pile in your next combat.

options.name: Insert (rarity) Potion
options.effect: Lose a (rarity) Potion. Obtain an Upgraded (rarity) skill.
options.notes: 3 random potions are chosen from your belt. The rarity of the potion determines the rarity of the upgraded skill card reward.

options.name: Nab the Map
options.effect: Receive the Spoils Map.

options.name: Slowly Find an Exit
options.effect: Lose 8 HP. Procure 1 random Potion.

options.name: This
options.effect: Lose 6 HP. Gain 41-69 Gold.

options.name: That
options.effect: Add Clumsy to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.

sharedEvents.name: War Historian, Repy
sharedEvents.condition: Only accessible if you have the Lantern Key (from The Lantern Key event in Act 2). The first ? room in Act 3 will be this event.

options.name: Unlock the Cage
options.effect: Lose Lantern Key. Obtain History Course.

options.name: Unlock the Chest
options.effect: Lose Lantern Key. Procure 2 random Potions. Obtain 2 random Relics.

options.name: Wongo's Bargain Bin
options.effect: Pay 100 Gold. Obtain 1 random Common Relic.

options.name: Wongo's Featured Item
options.effect: Pay 200 Gold. Obtain a random Relic.
options.notes: Featured Item random relic is named in the option, so you can know what you are paying for in advance.

options.name: Wongo's Mystery Box
options.effect: Pay 300 Gold. Obtain 3 random Relics after 5 combats.

options.name: Leave
options.effect: Downgrade a random card.

ancients.chanceRule: All ancients in an act's ancient pool are equally weighted.
ancients.darvSpecialRule: Darv has a 50% chance to be added to the Act 2 ancient pool. If that fails, he has another 50% chance to be added to the Act 3 ancient pool.

rareOffset.description: Rare offset starts at -5%, increases by 0.5% whenever a non-rare card is rolled in a card reward. Resets to -5% when a rare is rolled. Cannot exceed 40%.

uncommonChance.description: Uncommon chance is fixed depending on floor type.

upgradeChance.description: Non-rare cards in card rewards have a chance of being upgraded based on act.

combatEncounters.easyPoolSize: First 3 regular combats of Act 1, first 2 of Acts 2 and 3.
combatEncounters.poolReset: After seeing all encounters in a pool, the pool resets. All elites in an act will be encountered in random order before any repeated elites.
combatEncounters.tagRule: No encounter can be seen that shares a tag with the previous encounter. Exception: if no allowed encounters exist in the pool, one is selected at random disregarding restrictions.

potions.dropChance: Starts at 40%. Decreases by 10% if a potion drops from combat, increases by 10% if not.
potions.eliteBonus: Elites have a flat 12.5% bonus added to the current potion chance.

questionMarkRooms.description: All probabilities start at their base chance and go up by that much if you don't see that room type, resetting once you do.
questionMarkRooms.shopChance: Base: 3%. Cannot roll shop if the previous node is a shop or every connected future node is a shop.

shops.contents: 2 attacks, 2 skills, 1 power from your character's card pool; 1 uncommon colorless and 1 rare colorless card; 2 regular relics (common, uncommon, or rare); 1 shop relic; 3 potions; 1 card remove.
shops.sale: One card is randomly on sale, cutting its price in half.
shops.removePrice: 75 + 25*N (N = # of times card removal has been purchased previously)

monsters.name: Axebot
monsters.notes: Starts with Stock 2. Stock X: When killed, a new Axebot spawns (Stock X-1). Boot Up: 10 Block + 1 Str. One-Two: 5x2 (6x2). Sharpen: +4 Str. Hammer Uppercut: 8 (10) + 1 Weak + 1 Frail. Random moves, can't Sharpen 2x in a row.

monsters.name: Bowlbug (Egg)
monsters.notes: Starts with Imbalanced (stunned if attack fully blocked). Bite: 7 (8). Buff: +15 (16) Str. Stunned: pass turn. Always uses Bite.

monsters.name: Bowlbug (Nectar)
monsters.notes: Block 7 (8). Thrash: 3 dmg. Starts Thrash → Buff (+15/16 Str). Then Thrash every turn.

monsters.name: Bowlbug (Rock)
monsters.notes: Starts with Artifact 2. Headbutt: 15 (16) dmg. Uses Headbutt every turn. If fully blocked, stunned for a turn.

monsters.name: Bowlbug (Silk)
monsters.notes: Toxic Spit: Apply 1 Weak. Thrash: 4x2 (5x2). Alternates Toxic Spit → Thrash.

monsters.name: Calcified Cultist
monsters.notes: Incantation: Gain Ritual 2. Dark Strike: 9 (11). Starts Incantation, then Dark Strike every turn.

monsters.name: Chomper
monsters.notes: Clamp: 8x2 (9x2). Screech: 3 Dazed to Discard. 1st starts Clamp, 2nd starts Screech. Cycle Clamp → Screech.

monsters.name: Corpse Slug
monsters.notes: Whip Slap: 3x2. Glomp: 8 (9). Gloop: Apply 2 Frail. 1st picks randomly, then cycle Whip Slap → Glomp → Gloop.

monsters.name: Cubex Construct
monsters.notes: Starts with Ravenous 4 (5). Ravenous: when enemy dies, stunned + gain X Str. Charge Up: +2 Str. Repeater Blast: 7 (8) + 2 Str. Expel Blast: 5x2 (6x2). Submerge: 15 Block. Cycles Charge Up → Repeater Blast → Repeater Blast → Expel Blast → Submerge.

monsters.name: Damp Cultist
monsters.notes: Incantation: Ritual 5 (6). Dark Strike: 1 (3). Starts Incantation, then Dark Strike every turn.

monsters.name: Devoted Sculptor
monsters.notes: Starts with 13 Block + Artifact 1. Forbidden Incantation: Gain 9 Ritual. Savage: 12 (15). Starts Forbidden Incantation, then Savage every turn.

monsters.name: Exoskeleton
monsters.notes: Skitter: 1x3 (1x4). Mandible: 8 (9). Enrage: +2 Str. 1st starts Skitter, 2nd Mandible, 3rd Enrage. After Skitter→Mandible, after Mandible→Enrage, after Enrage→random Skitter/Mandible.

monsters.name: Fabricator
monsters.notes: Fabricate: summon 1 Defensive + 1 Aggro Bot. Fabricating Strike: 18 (21) + summon 1 Aggro Bot. Disintegrate: 11 (13). If ≤2 allies: random Fabricate/Fabricating Strike. If ≥3 allies: Disintegrate. Can't summon same minion consecutively.

monsters.name: Fake Merchant
monsters.notes: Starts with Hard to Kill 9 (reduce all damage to 9 max). Swipe: 13 (15). Spew Coins: 2x8. Throw Relic: 9 (10) + 1 Frail. Enrage: +2 Str. Starts Swipe, then random moves. After Throw Relic: random Swipe/Spew Coins.

monsters.name: Flyconid
monsters.notes: Frail Spores: 8 (9) + 2 Frail. Smash: 11 (12). Illusion: summon 1 Eye with Teeth. Eye with Teeth (6 HP): Distract (3 Dazed to discard), revives next turn at full HP.

monsters.name: Fogmog
monsters.notes: Swipe: 8 (9) + 1 Str. Vulnerable Spores: Apply 2 Vulnerable. Headbutt: 14 (16).

monsters.name: Eye with Teeth
monsters.notes: Starts with Illusion Illusion: When this dies, revives next turn at full HP | Always uses Distract.

monsters.name: Fossil Stalker
monsters.notes: Starts with Suck 3 Suck X: Whenever Fossil Stalker deals unblocked attack damage, it gains X strength. | Starts with Latch. Then chooses randomly between allowed options of Tackle, Latch, and Lash (allowed options equally likely). Moves cannot be used more than twice in a row.

monsters.name: Frog Knight
monsters.notes: Starts with Plating 15 (19) | Cycles through Tongue Lash -> Strike Down Evil -> For the Queen. After For the Queen, if below half HP and Beetle Charge has not been used, then uses Beetle Charge before starting the cycle over.

monsters.name: Fuzzy Wurm Crawler
monsters.notes: Starts with Acid Goop. Then cycles through Inhale -> Acid Goop -> Acid Goop.

monsters.name: Globe Head
monsters.notes: Starts with Galvanic 6. Galvanic X: You take X damage when a Power is played. | Cycles through Shocking Slap -> Thunder Strike -> Galvanic Burst.

monsters.name: Gremlin Merc
monsters.notes: Starts with Surprise and Thievery 20 Surprise: When killed, summons 1 Sneaky Gremlin and 1 Fat Gremlin (they start stunned) Thievery X: Steals X gold when attacking (stolen gold is held by Fat Gremlin once summoned) | Cycles through Gimme -> Double Smash -> Hehe.

monsters.name: Fat Gremlin
monsters.notes: Starts stunned when summoned after killing Gremlin Merc. | Always uses Flee.

monsters.name: Sneaky Gremlin
monsters.notes: Starts stunned when summoned after killing Gremlin Merc. | Always uses Tackle.

monsters.name: Haunted Ship
monsters.notes: Starts with Ramming Speed -> Haunt. Then picks randomly between Ramming Speed, Swipe, and Stomp (allowed options equally likely). Cannot use same move twice in a row.

monsters.name: Hunter Killer
monsters.notes: Tender: Whenever you play a card, lose 1 strength and 1 dexterity this turn. | Starts with Tenderizing Goop. Then chooses randomly between Bite and Puncture each turn. Bite cannot be used twice in a row. Puncture cannot be used more than twice in a row.

monsters.name: Inklet
monsters.notes: Starts with Slippery 1 Slippery X: The next time this enemy loses HP, it loses 1 HP instead. | Front and back Inklet start with Jab. Middle Inklet starts with Whirlwind. Alternates between Jab -> Whirlwind or Piercing Gaze (chosen randomly, equally likely).

monsters.name: Leaf Slime (Small)
monsters.notes: Starts randomly with Tackle or Goop. Then alternates between them.

monsters.name: Leaf Slime (Medium)
monsters.notes: Starts with Sticky Shot then alternates Clump Shot -> Sticky Shot.

monsters.name: Living Fog
monsters.notes: Smoggy: You can only play 1 skill per turn. | Starts with Advanced Gas. Then alternates between Bloat -> Super Gas Blast.

monsters.name: Gas Bomb
monsters.notes: Gas Bomb is a minion. | Uses Explode and dies.

monsters.name: Living Shield
monsters.notes: Starts with Rampart 25 Rampart X: Gives Turret Operator X block at the start of the player's turn. | Uses Shield Slam every turn if Turret Operator is alive. Then uses Smash every turn once Turret Operator is dead.

monsters.name: Louse Progenitor
monsters.notes: Starts with Curl Up Curl Up: Gain 14 (18) block upon first being hit. | Cycles through Web Cannon -> Curl and Grow -> Pounce.

monsters.name: Mawler
monsters.notes: Starts with Claw. Then chooses randomly between Rip & Tear, Roar, and Claw (all allowed options equally likely). Roar can only be used once. Claw and Rip & Tear cannot be used twice in a row.

monsters.name: Myte
monsters.notes: Toxic (status): At the end of your turn, take 5 damage if this is in your hand. 1 cost, exhausts. | First Myte starts with Toxic, second Myte starts with Suck. Then continue cycling through Toxic -> Bite -> Suck.

monsters.name: Nibbit
monsters.notes: In the single Nibbit encounter, it cycles through Butt -> Slice -> Hiss. In the two Nibbits encounter, the front starts with Slice and the back starts with Hiss. They then continue the cycle Butt -> Slice -> Hiss.

monsters.name: Ovicopter
monsters.notes: Lay Eggs will summon until there are 3 allies alive (no allies alive -> summons 3, 1 allies alive -> summons 2, etc) | Starts with Lay Eggs -> Smash -> Tenderizer.

monsters.name: Tough Egg
monsters.notes: Starts with Hatch 1. Hatch X: Hatches after X turns. | Always uses Hatch.

monsters.name: Hatchling
monsters.notes: Always uses Nibble.

monsters.name: Owl Magistrate
monsters.notes: Soar: Receives 50% less attack damage until it lands. | Cycles through Magistrate Scrutiny -> Peck Assault -> Judicial Flight -> Verdict.

monsters.name: Punch Construct
monsters.notes: Starts with Artifact 1. | Regular encounter: Cycles through Ready -> Strong Punch -> Fast Punch. Punch-Off event: First Punch Construct starts the cycle with Strong Punch (second starts with Ready like usual).

monsters.name: Ruby Raider (Assassin)
monsters.notes: Always uses Killshot.

monsters.name: Ruby Raider (Axe)
monsters.notes: Cycles through Swing -> Swing -> Big Swing.

monsters.name: Ruby Raider (Brute)
monsters.notes: Alternates between Beat -> Roar.

monsters.name: Ruby Raider (Crossbow)
monsters.notes: Alternates between Reload -> Fire.

monsters.name: Ruby Raider (Tracker)
monsters.notes: Starts with Track, then uses Hounds every turn.

monsters.name: Scroll of Biting
monsters.notes: Starts with Paper Cuts 2 Paper Cuts X: Whenever you take unblocked attack damage from this enemy, lose X Max HP. | First scroll picks its first move randomly. Scrolls 2 and 3 starts with the next moves in the cycle Chomp -> Chew -> More Teeth. Scroll 4 (if present) starts with More Teeth. Then follows pattern Chomp -> More Teeth -> Chew, but after Chew picks randomly between Chomp and More Teeth and resumes pattern.

monsters.name: Seapunk
monsters.notes: Cycles through Sea Kick -> Spinning Kick -> Bubble Burp.

monsters.name: Sewer Clam
monsters.notes: Starts with Plating 8 (9). | Alternates between Pressurize -> Jet.

monsters.name: Shrinker Beetle
monsters.notes: Shrink: Deal 30% reduced damage. | Starts with Shrinker. Then alternates Chomp -> Stomp.

monsters.name: Slimed Berserker
monsters.notes: Cycles through Vomit Ichor -> Furious Pummeling -> Leeching Hug -> Smother.

monsters.name: Slithering Strangler
monsters.notes: Constrict X: While the Slithering Strangler is alive, take X damage at the end of your turn. | Alternates between Constrict -> Thwack/Lash (chooses between Thwack and Lash at random, equally likely)

monsters.name: Sludge Spinner
monsters.notes: Starts with Oil Spray. Then chooses randomly between all allowed moves each turn. Cannot use any move twice in a row.

monsters.name: Slumbering Beetle
monsters.notes: Starts with Plating 15 (18) and Slumber 3 Slumber X: Counter decreases after taking a turn or losing HP. Awakens at the end of its turn if counter has reached 0. | Sleeps until it awakens. Then uses Roll Out every turn.

monsters.name: Snapping Jaxfruit
monsters.notes: Always uses Energy Orb.

monsters.name: Spiny Toad
monsters.notes: Cycles through Protruding Spikes -> Spike Explosion -> Tongue Lash.

monsters.name: The Lost
monsters.notes: Alternates between Debilitating Smog -> Eye Lasers

monsters.name: The Forgotten
monsters.notes: Alternates between Miasma -> Dread.

monsters.name: The Obscura
monsters.notes: Starts with Illusion. Then chooses randomly between Piercing Gaze, Wail, and Hardening Strike (allowed options equally likely). Cannot use any move twice in a row.

monsters.name: Parafright
monsters.notes: Starts with Illusion. Illusion: When this dies, revives next turn at full HP | Always uses Slam.

monsters.name: Thieving Hopper
monsters.notes: Starts with Escape Artist Escape Artist: Tries to escape the combat after 5 turns. (Stolen card is taken from draw or discard pile. Chooses a random card with priorities: 1. non-imbued uncommon card, 2. non-imbued common, rare, or event card, 3. non-imbued basic or quest card, 4. imbued or ancient card, 5. curse or anything else) Swipe: Upon killing this enemy, the stolen card is returned. Flutter X: Receives 50% less attack damage. Deal attack damage X times to remove Flutter and stun it. (Warning: Game softlocks if Thieving Hopper cannot find a valid target to steal) | Always uses Thievery -> Flutter -> Hat Trick -> Nab -> Escape.

monsters.name: Toadpole
monsters.notes: Front Toadpole starts with Spiken. Non-front Toadpole(s) start with Whirl. Then continue following cycle Spike Spit -> Whirl -> Spiken (then repeat).

monsters.name: Tunneler
monsters.notes: Burrowed: Block is not removed at the start of Tunneler's turn. Becomes stunned if all block is removed. | Starts with Bite -> Burrow. While Burrowed, always uses Below.

monsters.name: Turret Operator
monsters.notes: Cycles through Unload -> Unload -> Reload.

monsters.name: Twig Slime (S)
monsters.notes: Uses Tackle every turn.

monsters.name: Twig Slime (M)
monsters.notes: Starts with Sticky Shot -> Clump Shot. Then chooses randomly each turn between Sticky Shot and Clump Shot (allowed options equally likely). Cannot use Sticky Shot twice in a row, and cannot use Clump shot more than twice in a row.

monsters.name: Two-Tailed Rat
monsters.notes: First Rat starts randomly with Scratch, Disesase Bite, or Screech. 2nd Rat has next move after it in the cycle Scratch -> Disease Bite -> Screech, and 3rd Rat has the next after that. If Call for Backup is not allowed for a rat, it picks randomly between Scratch, Disease Bite, and Screech (equal weight among allowed options). If Call for Backup is allowed for a rat, then it has a 75% chance to Call for Backup, and remaining 25% to pick randomly between Scratch, Disease Bite, and Screech (equal weight among allowed options).

monsters.name: Vine Shambler
monsters.notes: Tangled X: Attacks cost 1 additional energy for X turns. | Cycles through Swipe -> Grasping Vines -> Chomp.

monsters.name: Wriggler
monsters.notes: If spawned from Phrog Parasite's death, starts stunned. Otherwise (or after stun), Wrigglers in positions 1 & 3 start with Nasty Bite and Wrigglers in positions 2 & 4 start with Wriggle. They then alternate between Nasty Bite -> Wriggle.

monsters.name: Axebots
monsters.notes: 2 Axebots. Each has Stock 2 (respawns twice). Boot Up: 10 Block + 1 Str. One-Two: 5x2 (6x2). Sharpen: +4 Str. Hammer Uppercut: 8 (10) + Weak + Frail. Random moves, can't Sharpen 2x in a row.

monsters.name: Bowlbugs
monsters.notes: 4 types: Egg (Bite 7/8, +15/16 Str), Rock (Headbutt 15/16, Artifact 2), Silk (Toxic Spit + Thrash 4x2/5x2), Nectar (Thrash 3 + Buff +15/16 Str). Egg has Imbalanced (stunned if fully blocked).

monsters.name: Chompers
monsters.notes: 2 Chompers. Clamp: 8x2 (9x2). Screech: 3 Dazed to Discard. 1st starts Clamp, 2nd starts Screech. Cycle Clamp → Screech.

monsters.name: Construct Menagerie
monsters.notes: Fabricator (150/155 HP) + minion bots. Fabricate: summon bots. Fabricating Strike: 18 (21) + summon. Disintegrate: 11 (13). Guardbot: 15 Block. Noisebot: Dazed. Stabbot: 11 (12) + Frail. Zapbot: 14 (15) + High Voltage.

monsters.name: Corpse Slugs
monsters.notes: 2-3 Corpse Slugs. Whip Slap: 3x2. Glomp: 8 (9). Gloop: 2 Frail. 1st picks randomly, subsequent start at next move in cycle. Cycle Whip Slap → Glomp → Gloop.

monsters.name: Cultists
monsters.notes: Calcified Cultist: Ritual 2, then Dark Strike 9 (11) every turn. Damp Cultist: Ritual 5 (6), then Dark Strike 1 (3) every turn.

monsters.name: Exoskeletons
monsters.notes: 3 Exoskeletons. Skitter: 1x3 (1x4). Mandible: 8 (9). Enrage: +2 Str. 1st starts Skitter, 2nd Mandible, 3rd Enrage. After Skitter→Mandible, after Mandible→Enrage, after Enrage→random.

monsters.name: Inklets
monsters.notes: 3-4 Inklets. Jab: 3 (4). Whirlwind: 2x3 (3x3). Piercing Gaze: 10 (11). Alternates Jab → random Whirlwind or Piercing Gaze.

monsters.name: Mytes
monsters.notes: 2 Mytes. Toxic: 2 Toxic to Hand + 2 (3) Str. Bite: 13 (15). Suck: 4 (6). 1st starts Toxic, 2nd starts Bite. Cycle Toxic → Bite → Suck.

monsters.name: Nibbits
monsters.notes: 2 Nibbits. Butt: 12 (13). Slice: 6 (7) + 5 (6) Block. Hiss: +2 (3) Str. Front starts Slice, back starts Hiss. Cycle Butt → Slice → Hiss.

monsters.name: Overgrowth Crawlers
monsters.notes: Fuzzy Wurm Crawler. Acid Goop: 4 (6). Gorge: +7 Str. Starts Acid Goop → Gorge. Repeat.

monsters.name: Ruby Raiders
monsters.notes: 3-4 Raiders of different types. Assassin: Killshot 11 (12). Axe: Swing 5 (6) + Heavy Swing 12 (13). Brute: Beat 7 (8) + Rally +3 Str. Crossbow: Fire 14 (16) + Hunker 3 Block. Tracker: Track 2 Frail + Barrage 1x8 (1x9).

monsters.name: Scrolls of Biting
monsters.notes: 2-3 Scrolls. Chomp: 14 (16). More Teeth: 5x2 (6x2). Chew: +2 Str. Pattern Chomp → More Teeth → Chew, after Chew random Chomp/More Teeth.

monsters.name: Slimes
monsters.notes: Mix of Leaf and Twig slimes. Leaf (Small): Tackle 3 (4) + 1 Slimed. Leaf (Medium): Sticky Shot 2 Slimed + Slam 8 (9). Twig (Small): Tackle 4 (5). Twig (Medium): Clump Shot 11 (12) + 1 Slimed.

monsters.name: The Lost And Forgotten
monsters.notes: The Lost (93/99 HP): Debilitating Smog -2 (-3) Str, Pummel 4x2 (5x2) + 2 (3) Str. The Forgotten (106/111 HP): Miasma -2 (-3) Dex, Concentrated Strike 13 (15) + Dex amount, Block 8 + 2 (3) Dex.

monsters.name: Toadpoles
monsters.notes: 2-3 Toadpoles. Starts with Thorns. Spike Spit: Lose 2 Thorns + 3x3 (4x3). Nibble: 7 (8). Spikify: Gain 2 Thorns.

monsters.name: Two-Tailed Rats
monsters.notes: 3 Rats. Scratch: 8 (9). Disease Bite: 6 (7) + 1 Frail. Screech: Apply 2 Weak. Call for Backup: summon new rat. 75% chance to Call for Backup if available (after 2 turns, max 3 total). Screech has 3-turn cooldown. Can't repeat Scratch/Disease Bite.
